summary: Tested UMKM Sarapan app end-to-end. Backend: 22/22 pytest passing (auth/cookies, 401 protection, Mitra/Product/Transaction CRUD with cascade delete, profit & total_pendapatan math, dashboard/today, dashboard/chart for daily/weekly/monthly with correct bucket counts 7/8/6). Frontend: Login + dashboard render correctly with red theme; metric cards, sales chart with Harian/Mingguan/Bulanan tabs, Export PDF and Cetak Struk buttons all visible. Mitra add (UI), Product add via Radix Select (mitra), and Transaction creation all worked - data persisted with correct Rupiah formatting and profit calc (Rp (10.000-7.000)*5 = Rp 15.000 verified visually). CRITICAL UX BUG: CRA dev-server runtime error overlay 'ResizeObserver loop completed with undelivered notifications' triggers from Recharts ResponsiveContainer rendering at width(-1)/height(-1) and intercepts the whole viewport, blocking sidebar navigation on Dashboard/Transactions pages.

ui_bugs.issue: CRA dev error overlay 'Uncaught runtime errors: ResizeObserver loop completed with undelivered notifications' appears on screen and blocks ALL interaction (sidebar links, buttons). Recharts also logs 'The width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0' indicating the chart container has no concrete dimensions when first measured. The overlay can be closed manually but reappears on subsequent resizes/route changes.
ui_bugs.selector: iframe overlay shown by react-error-overlay; chart at [data-testid="sales-chart-card"]

ui_bugs.issue: Radix warning: 'Missing Description or aria-describedby={undefined} for DialogContent' on every dialog open. Accessibility issue.
ui_bugs.selector: all Dialog components in Mitra.jsx / Products.jsx / Transactions.jsx

issues: Looks polished. Red CTA, food image, Indonesian copy all good.

action_items: Fix Recharts ResizeObserver loop warning to stop triggering the CRA dev overlay. Options: (a) wrap ResponsiveContainer in a div with fixed/min height (e.g. h-80) so initial measurement isn't -1x-1; (b) add a small global window.addEventListener('error', e => { if (e.message && e.message.includes('ResizeObserver loop')) { e.stopImmediatePropagation(); } }) in index.js to swallow the benign warning so the dev overlay no longer engages; (c) ensure Recharts ResponsiveContainer parent has explicit width/height. This is the only blocker.
Add DialogDescription (or aria-describedby) to each <DialogContent> in Mitra/Products/Transactions pages to remove Radix a11y warnings.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is fine for MVP scope but is a single 520-line file mixing models/auth/routes; consider splitting into routers/auth.py, routers/mitra.py, etc., before adding more features.
dashboard/chart 'weekly' path uses nested loop per transaction over labels - O(N*8) but acceptable for now.
CORS_ORIGINS='*' with allow_credentials=True is invalid per spec; browsers may reject. For production, set explicit origin.
secure=False on cookies and samesite='lax' is acceptable for preview-only; production deployment must set secure=True.
No rate limiting / brute-force lockout on /api/auth/login (playbook calls for 5-fail lockout). Not implemented.

Product update endpoint changes mitra_name on the product but does NOT propagate to existing transactions' denormalized mitra_name/menu fields - historical transactions will keep old names (could be intentional).
bcrypt hashes generated correctly with $2b$ prefix (verified).

success_rate.frontend: 85% - core flows work; dev overlay blocks UX

seed_data_creation: Tests create TEST_/UI_ prefixed Mitra+Product+Transaction and clean up after; manual UI test data was cleaned via API.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend regression suite is at /app/backend/tests/test_umkm_api.py (pytest). Run: pytest /app/backend/tests/test_umkm_api.py -v. All 22 currently passing. For frontend, the only outstanding blocker is the CRA dev error overlay caused by Recharts ResizeObserver warning - after main agent fixes this, re-test sidebar navigation Dashboard->Mitra->Produk->Transaksi and Export PDF / Cetak Struk button clicks. Use page.get_by_role('option', name=...) for Radix Select options (don't use text=NAME because Radix renders a hidden native <option> too which matches twice).
rca of the issue: CRA's react-error-overlay listens for window 'error' events and treats the well-known 'ResizeObserver loop completed with undelivered notifications' browser warning as a fatal error. Recharts <ResponsiveContainer> emits a layout pass while its parent flex container has not yet committed dimensions (initial -1x-1), which triggers the ResizeObserver loop diagnostic. The overlay then renders a fullscreen modal that blocks all pointer events. Fix in App.js or index.js by either (1) suppressing this benign error globally: window.addEventListener('error', e => { if (e.message?.includes('ResizeObserver loop')) e.stopImmediatePropagation(); }); and same for 'unhandledrejection'; OR (2) wrap ResponsiveContainer in a sized div (e.g. <div style={{width:'100%', height:320}}>) so the first measurement is valid.
